title: Authentication Providers
description: Configure external authentication providers for single sign-on (SSO). Parthenon supports SAML 2.0 and OIDC protocols, allowing integration with enterprise identity providers like Azure AD, Okta, and Google Workspace.
tips: Enable a provider and configure its credentials before testing the connection.
Use the Test button to verify that the provider responds correctly before enabling for users.
SAML providers require metadata URL or XML configuration from your identity provider.
OIDC providers need client ID, client secret, and discovery URL.
Only one provider can be the primary login method, but multiple can be enabled simultaneously.
